pilot_scope: 2 SAEs (MatryoshkaBatchTopK_trainer_0 + TopK_trainer_0) × 3 WordNet hierarchies × 2 non-hierarchy control pairs

pilot_success_criteria.numeric_stability: All absorption scores are finite and non-NaN
pilot_success_criteria.probe_quality: Probe AUROC > 0.6 for all 3 tested hierarchies
pilot_success_criteria.expected_ordering: Matryoshka semantic absorption < TopK semantic absorption
pilot_success_criteria.hierarchy_specificity: Semantic-hierarchy score > non-hierarchy control score for at least 1 of 2 SAEs
pilot_success_criteria.pipeline_validation: End-to-end pipeline completes without errors on Pythia-160M

go_no_go_decision.go: Pilot meets all success criteria. Proceed to full experiment.
go_no_go_decision.no_go_probe_quality: If probe AUROC < 0.6 for any hierarchy, refine concept selection or sentence templates and re-run pilot.
go_no_go_decision.no_go_ordering: If absorption ordering inverts (Matryoshka > TopK), investigate probe training or concept selection before scaling.
go_no_go_decision.no_go_pipeline: If official SAEBench eval or custom probe pipeline fails, debug and re-run before full experiment.
